interaction.prompt: 3-on-2 rush. The strong-side D squared up on you; his partner is reading the slot. Where's the right pass?

feedback.right: LW high-weak side. Both defenders cheated to the strong side and the slot — your wing is alone for a clean shot.
feedback.wrong: C in the slot is shadowed; the strong-side D is between you and there. The weak-side LW is the read.

tip: On rushes, scan WEAK-side. Defenders chase the puck; the cross-ice teammate is usually the open option.
why: Odd-man rushes reward forcing the defender to commit, then moving the puck the OTHER way. The closer pass is almost always the wrong read — defenders close on the puck.
